The U.S. House of Representatives is set to vote on an Iran war powers resolution at 4 pm Eastern tomorrow. Only needing 51 votes to advance to the other legislative body, the Senate, the resolution, championed by Democrats, will require U.S. forces to be removed from hostilities with Iran until such actions gain congressional approval.
